---
title: "Flight Delay Predictions"
subtitle: "Machine Learning at Scale Project using PySpark and Databricks | UC Berkeley MIDS"
description: "A Databricks ML project predicting U.S. domestic flight delays using PySpark and MLlib at scale across millions of flight records."
author:
  - name: Mohamed Bakr
    url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohdbakr/
  - name: Erica Landreth
    url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/erica-landreth-1427aa167/
  - name: Danielle Yoseloff
    url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/danielleyoseloff/
  - name: Shruti Gupta
    url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sgraya/
date: "2025-04-01"
date-modified: "2025-04-01"
slug: "flight-delay-predictions"
image: /projects/flight-delays/featured.png
image-alt: "Flight delays predictions project"
categories: 
  - Machine Learning
  - PySpark
  - Databricks
  - Big Data
  - Data Engineering
  - Data Science
  - MLlib
  - MapReduce
  - Feature Engineering
  - Classification Models
  - MIDS
  - NOAA
links:
- icon: link
  name: Docs Website
  url: https://bakr-ucb.github.io/261-Final-Project/
  target: _blank
  rel: noopener noreferrer
- icon:
  name: Final Presentation
  url: https://github.com/bakr-UCB/261-Final-Project/blob/main/reports/figures/Phase_III_Final_Presentation.pdf
  target: _blank
  rel: noopener noreferrer
- icon: github
  name: Repo
  url: https://github.com/bakr-UCB/261-Final-Project
  target: _blank
  rel: noopener noreferrer
---


![Flight Delay Predictions](/projects/flight-delays/screenshot.png){.project-banner}

A Databricks-based machine learning project aimed at predicting U.S. domestic flight delays by analyzing millions of flight and weather records. Using PySpark and MLlib, we applied distributed data processing and classification models at scale. Feature engineering and model training were executed using MapReduce-style operations to identify delay patterns influenced by weather, airline, and airport congestion factors. The project demonstrates how cloud-native platforms and big data tools can enable scalable, real-time predictive analytics.
